scripts.setup:all: npm install && cd backend && UV_NO_PROGRESS=1 uv sync -v
scripts.kill:frontend: sh -c 'lsof -ti tcp:5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; lsof -ti tcp:4173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" 2>/dev/null || true'
scripts.kill:backend: sh -c 'lsof -ti tcp:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "uvicorn app.main:app" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "debugpy --listen 0.0.0.0:5678" 2>/dev/null || true'
scripts.kill: npm run kill:frontend && npm run kill:backend
scripts.db:up: sh -c '_preset_postgres_host_port=${POSTGRES_HOST_PORT-}; if [ -f database/.env ]; then set -a; . database/.env; set +a; fi; if [ -n "${_preset_postgres_host_port}" ]; then POSTGRES_HOST_PORT=${_preset_postgres_host_port}; fi; POSTGRES_HOST_PORT=${POSTGRES_HOST_PORT:-5432} docker compose up -d postgres'
scripts.db:init: sh -c 'npm run db:up || echo "db:up skipped; trying existing postgres"; if [ -n "${POSTGRES_HOST_PORT-}" ] && [ -z "${POSTGRES_PORT-}" ]; then export POSTGRES_PORT=${POSTGRES_HOST_PORT}; fi; cd backend && uv run python ../database/init_tables.py'
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace backend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run preview --workspace frontend" "npm run start --workspace backend"
scripts.clean:pycache: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import shutil; [shutil.rmtree(p, ignore_errors=True) for p in Path('.').rglob('__pycache__')]; [p.unlink() for p in Path('.').rglob('*.pyc')]"
